my_thoughts: The comparison_contrast mechanism with SM_04 feels like seeking_optimal_method is being met with a specific geometric cut. But what if the geometry itself is what they're resisting? The instrumental_fixation, efficiency_seeking suggests they're aware of something but can't name it.
accumulated_insight: T3 (Final): Student 'Please tell me which road to self-realisation is the shortest.'—now seeking optimal method. Episode complete after 3 turns, moving from testing practice against concept to seeking optimal method. Teaching arc used comparison contrast in SELF-MAKING phase to address instrumental fixation, efficiency seeking. Student progressed through 3-turn teaching sequence.
visible_response:
No way is short or long, but some people are more in earnest and some are less.
I can tell you about myself. I was a simple man, but I trusted my Guru.
What he told me to do, I did. He told me to concentrate on 'I am' — I did.
He told me that I am beyond all perceivables and conceivables — I believed.
I gave him my heart and soul, my entire attention and the whole of my spare time.
As a result of faith and earnest application, I realised my self (swarupa) within three years.
